issue.title: www.makemytrip.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.makemytrip.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.makemytrip.com%2F) ### Comment > Typosquating protection is blocking legitimate domains. Popular domains and sub domains haven't been all properly identified , and so even the legitimate sun domains are getting flagged. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/hlxo4he8bg0scw00sw44o4scsws0kso5amo278xl9c.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1f2oi8n6cjgg848gggs0k4ok0kkck0cq32600yp89w.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Router DNS server: | Private System version: | `Android 16` Browser: | Opera Blocklists: | **AdGuard:**
AdGuard DNS filter Custom filters: | `Typosquating protection`

comment.body: Components in the website aren't working, like the photos aren't showing.

Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/hlxo4he8bg0scw00sw44o4scsws0kso5amo278xl9c.jpg?nc=1)

AdGuard DNS filter Custom filters: | `Typosquating protection`
